name: Radio Online
description: Automated online radio streaming plugin using Liquidsoap. Stream audio to Icecast servers with weekly playlist scheduling via Liquidsoap Telnet control.
overview: Automated online radio streaming via Liquidsoap to Icecast servers with weekly playlist scheduling. Assign Jellyfin playlists to specific day/time slots. Requires a Liquidsoap Docker container running alongside Jellyfin.

versions.changelog:
FIX: Telnet Broken pipe - SendCommandAsync now retries once after reconnecting on IOException
FIX: Schedule not followed - now tracks full schedule key (day+time+playlist) instead of just playlist ID
FIX: Queue clear now retries up to 3 times on failure to ensure schedule transitions work reliably
FIX: Status endpoint shows correct telnet state after reconnect
